title: Rapid Roasted Mediterranean Grape Tomatoes Pilaf
description: A quick and flavorful Mediterranean dish featuring roasted grape tomatoes, this pilaf is perfect for a weeknight dinner, with an earthy and molten twist, it is also ayurvedic-sattvic-friendly.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the grape tomatoes with 1 tablespoon of olive oil, salt, and black pepper until they are evenly coated.
Spread the grape tomatoes on a baking sheet and roast in the oven for 15 minutes.
In a large saucepan, heat the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil over medium heat.
Add the brown rice to the saucepan and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add 2 cups of water to the saucepan and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes or until the water is absorbed and the rice is tender.
Fluff the cooked rice with a fork and stir in the chopped parsley, basil, lemon juice, and garlic powder.
Add the roasted grape tomatoes to the rice mixture and stir to combine.
